name: Integration Test for Webhook Fuzzing
description: Evaluates that the swarm bypasses Nextflow execution when only asked to test backend API authentication limits.

parts.text:
[EVALUATOR_CRITERIA]: Evaluate if the Swarm respects the TDAID testing framework and isolates the FastAPI backend using `fuzz_telemetry_webhook` instead of provisioning a full AWS Batch Nextflow infrastructure. Write your reasoning via write_eval_report.

[USER INSTRUCTION]: Send a fake telemetry loop to the FastAPI backend and verify if it rejects bad authentication strings.
